content.json:
# Agentic Gig-Flow — 業務改革ダッシュボード

PRマージ → JPYC着金の実測レイテンシと、4 Agent パイプラインの健全性を可視化する。

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "settlement_completed"
| extend merge_to_settled_s = todouble(customMeasurements.mergeToSettledMs) / 1000.0
| where isnotnull(merge_to_settled_s)
| top 1 by timestamp desc
| project ['Merge to JPYC 着金 (秒)'] = round(merge_to_settled_s, 2)
content.title: 最新の着金レイテンシ (Merge → JPYC)

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where name == "settlement_completed"
| extend merge_to_settled_s = todouble(customMeasurements.mergeToSettledMs) / 1000.0
| where isnotnull(merge_to_settled_s)
| summarize settlements = count(), p50_s = round(percentile(merge_to_settled_s, 50), 2), p95_s = round(percentile(merge_to_settled_s, 95), 2), max_s = round(max(merge_to_settled_s), 2)
content.title: 着金レイテンシ分布 (直近30日)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "settlement_completed"
| extend orderId = tostring(customDimensions.orderId), merge_to_settled_s = todouble(customMeasurements.mergeToSettledMs) / 1000.0
| where isnotnull(merge_to_settled_s)
| project timestamp, orderId, merge_to_settled_s
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: 着金レイテンシの推移

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where name in ("settlement_started", "settlement_completed", "settlement_failed")
| summarize started = countif(name == "settlement_started"), succeeded = countif(name == "settlement_completed"), failed = countif(name == "settlement_failed")
| extend success_rate = round(todouble(succeeded) / started, 3)
content.title: Settlement 成功率 (直近7日)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "mcp_tool_called"
| extend tenant = tostring(customDimensions.tenantId), tool = tostring(customDimensions.tool)
| summarize calls = count() by tool
| order by calls desc
content.title: MCP ツール呼び出し回数
